title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS CENTRAL COUNTY HEALTH CENTER TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 801 Pacific Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (504) 842-3900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (504) 842-3900 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: May vary, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MEDICATION ASSISTED TREATMENT FOR SUBSTANCE USE DISORDERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS CENTRAL COUNTY HEALTH CENTER
